arts.ttl: West Ham hero reveals heartbreaking reason why he has stopped cancer treatment as former footballer opens up on health battle
arts.sum: 'At the moment, I am feeling well,' he said. 'Lots of friends have said to me that, if they didn't know what I was going through, they would think that I was fine, which is nice for me to hear.'
